questions.question: Paul asks the Galatians if they received the Spirit by works of the law or by what?
Paul says the law served as what until Christ came?
Paul says there is neither Jew nor Gentile, slave nor free, male nor female — all are one in Christ Jesus.
Christ redeemed us from the _____ of the law by becoming a curse for us.
If you belong to Christ, then you are Abraham's _____, and heirs according to the promise.
